title: Quality Gate Orchestration, Failure Semantics, and Required Checks · CI/CD Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A release board compares near-miss decisions for quality gate orchestration, failure semantics, and required checks and requires the learner to defend the smallest safe quality gate dependency graph. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for quality gate dependency graph. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define each formatter, lint, type, test, build, security, and policy command with deterministic inputs, exit semantics, output, and owner.
Order cheap deterministic gates before costly work while parallelizing independent evidence and preserving causal diagnosis.
Distinguish success, failure, cancelled, skipped, neutral, timed out, and continued failures in job and required-check policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz pipeline hides formatter, lint, type, test, and build failures behind continue-on-error and skipped jobs while branch rules require a renamed check. Rebuild the dependency graph and evidence ownership. Competency probe: Publish concise annotations and summaries with exact command, revision, environment, failure owner, retained artifact, and rerun limits.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

Evidence target: Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for publish concise annotations and summaries with exact command, revision, environment, failure owner, retained artifact, and rerun limits. For Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership, keep Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.text: A quiz pipeline hides formatter, lint, type, test, and build failures behind continue-on-error and skipped jobs while branch rules require a renamed check. Rebuild the dependency graph and evidence ownership. Competency probe: Publish concise annotations and summaries with exact command, revision, environment, failure owner, retained artifact, and rerun limits.

content.title: Fault-isolation decision
content.text: Select evidence that identifies a cause, not a patch that only hides the Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership symptom.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: GitHub Actions Concepts, Workflow Syntax, Contexts, Events, and Runners — Controls workflow execution, YAML, expressions, contexts, events, jobs, matrices, outputs, artifacts, caches, concurrency, reuse, runners, environments, and limits.

hints: For Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership, name the event, revision, actor, permission, runner, dependency, artifact, environment, deployment, and recovery boundary, Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership, trace this concrete input and predict evaluation, shell, job graph, cache, artifact, trust, deployment, signal, rollback, and cleanup evidence before reviewing it: A quiz pipeline hides formatter, lint, type, test, and build failures behind continue-on-error and skipped jobs while branch rules require a renamed check. Rebuild the dependency graph and evidence ownership. Competency probe: Publish concise annotations and summaries with exact command, revision, environment, failure owner, retained artifact, and rerun limits.

For Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership, challenge the documented misconception with workflow, run, artifact, policy, fault, repair, rollback, and transfer evidence: Dumping complete logs is the clearest and safest failure handoff.

stimulus.title: Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: Dumping complete logs is the clearest and safest failure handoff.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Publish concise annotations and summaries with exact command, revision, environment, failure owner, retained artifact, and rerun limits.

options.text: Run the boundary case, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.
Accept the result because visible output is the highest authority. That claim does not survive the diagnose the hidden failure evidence boundary.

For diagnose the hidden failure, copy one familiar workflow, omit event and revision identity, permissions, runner, immutable artifact, failure, rollback, and disposable delivery-environment transfer checks, then accept a green run as production proof.

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz pipeline hides formatter, lint, type, test, and build failures behind continue-on-error and skipped jobs while branch rules require a renamed check. Rebuild the dependency graph and evidence ownership. Competency probe: Publish concise annotations and summaries with exact command, revision, environment, failure owner, retained artifact, and rerun limits.

Evidence target: Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership, keep Ci Gate Evidence Summary Ownership connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Publish concise annotations and summaries with exact command, revision, environment, failure owner, retained artifact, and rerun limits.
